title: Entropith
description: A mod with Insanely powerful, OP destructive, and completely unbalanced, overpowered weapons.
body: Ever wanted just a mod with only overpowered, unbalenced weapons and armor? Entropith brings that to the table, Entropith tools, combining them into an omnitool, overpowered abbilitys (wip) invincible armor. And... In a hidden tab... you will find a despawner...
